name: Observation
abstract: A scientific observation or measurement of a heritage object or place — environmental monitoring, condition assessment, conservation science — modelled as a CIDOC-CRM E16 Measurement (the entry point CRMsci specialises for scientific observation) and profiling the PROV-O Activity. Bridges sensor data recorded via the OGC SensorThings API back into the CIDOC-CRM graph.

examples.title: A relative humidity reading linked back to its CIDOC-CRM context
examples.content: A humidity measurement of the Great Gallery, taken by a SensorThings API `Sensor` and recorded as a SensorThings API `Observation` — this block carries the CRM-side context (what was measured, what property, by whom) while the reading itself stays in STA.

examples.title: A minimal record for an undated legacy reading
examples.content: Only `identifier` and `measurementOf` are required — useful for migrating legacy monitoring logs that predate the SensorThings API deployment.

annotatedSchema:
$schema: https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema
title: Observation
description: 'A scientific observation or measurement, modelled as a CIDOC-CRM E16
  Measurement. Profiles

  PROV-O''s Activity: `startedAtTime`/`endedAtTime` carry the time of observation,
  `used` the

  sensor or instrument involved (CIDOC-CRM P16_used_specific_object), `generated`
  the OGC

  SensorThings API `Observation` resource holding the actual reading (CIDOC-CRM

  P108_has_produced), `wasAssociatedWith` the operator or monitoring system responsible,
  and

  `atLocation` where the observation took place. This block adds a local identifier,
  the

  heritage object or place being measured, and the property observed.

  '
allOf:
- $ref: https://ogcincubator.github.io/bblock-prov-schema/build/annotated/ogc-utils/prov-activity/schema.yaml
- type: object
  required:
  - measurementOf
  properties:
    identifier:
      type: string
      description: A local identifier for this observation (CIDOC-CRM P1_is_identified_by).
      x-jsonld-id: http://www.cidoc-crm.org/cidoc-crm/P1_is_identified_by
    measurementOf:
      type: string
      format: uri
      description: URI of the `heritage-object` or `place` being measured (CIDOC-CRM
        P39_measured).
      x-jsonld-id: http://www.cidoc-crm.org/cidoc-crm/P39_measured
      x-jsonld-type: '@id'
    observedProperty:
      type: string
      format: uri
      description: The property or phenomenon observed, typically a GEOSS Essential
        Variable or Getty AAT concept URI, e.g. relative humidity or surface temperature
        (CIDOC-CRM P40_observed_dimension).
      x-jsonld-id: http://www.cidoc-crm.org/cidoc-crm/P40_observed_dimension
      x-jsonld-type: '@id'
x-jsonld-prefixes:
  crm: http://www.cidoc-crm.org/cidoc-crm/
